_doc: Combinatorial text presets for the aftr: 4 styles x 8 eases. Call via the bridge command `applyTextStyle` with { compId, style, ease, text, ... }. wordReveal is approved/deterministic; the other three styles are interim and pending refinement.

call.multiline: Put \n in text for multiple lines. Lines are positioned MANUALLY by measured glyph metrics (AE leading is bypassed because variable fonts override it with a fixed, non-scaling offset). Spacing is deterministic and scales with font size.

lineHeight.rule: spacing = max over adjacent line pairs of (upper line descent + lower line ascent) + 0.10 * cap height, all measured from the actual glyphs at the actual size
lineHeight.why: the lower line's ascenders must clear the upper line; using only cap height makes ascenders touch. Content-aware: descenders on an upper line auto-expand the gap.
lineHeight.override: pass lineHeight (px) to set spacing explicitly
lineHeight.cascade: multi-line animates as one continuous per-character sweep (each line timed by its share of total characters), so separate line layers still look seamless

wordReveal.notes: Approved on style 1. Deterministic: measures glyph widths, centers each line on centerX and the block on centerY, animates each word as its own layer; words cascade with overlap.

charScale.notes: Approved on style 2. Single centered text layer, character-based scale+rise+fade. Self-contained: pass `text` and it builds a centered layer. animFrom -15 fixes the first-letter edge artifact; easeLow 0 keeps the entry snappy.

bunchRotate.notes: Approved on style 3. Single centered text layer; characters bunched tightly then scale + rotate + fade apart into place. Self-contained: pass `text`. animFrom -15 fixes the first-letter edge.

blurFade.notes: Approved on style 4. Single combined animator (opacity + scale + rotation + blur) swept across characters: letters cascade with overlap and each letter's fade + un-blur fire together. animFrom -15 fixes the first-letter edge.
